channel.title: Posts on Yuan Caiyou's Pages
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Yuan Caiyou's Pages

item.title: 离散分部求和举例
item.description: 定义离散算子, $$ \mathcal{L}_h^x u_{i,j} = \frac{2}{x_{i+1} - x_{i-1}} \left( \frac{u_{i+1,j} - u_{i,j}}{x_{i+1} - x_{i}} -\frac{u_{i,j} - u_{i-1,j}}{x_{i} - x_{i-1}} \right) $$ $$ \mathcal{L}_h^y u_{i,j} = \frac{2}{y_{j+1} - y_{j-1}} \left(\frac{u_{i,j+1} - u_{i,j}}{y_{j+1} - y_{j}} \frac{u_{i,j} - u_{i,j-1}}{y_{j} - y_{j-1}} \right) $$ 定义离散内积$(\cdot, \cdot)h$, $$(u, v)h = \sum_{i=1}^{N-1}\sum_{j=1}^{N-1}u{i,j}v{i,j} \left(\frac{x_{i+1} - x_{i-1}}{2}\right) \left(\frac{y_{j+1} -
